note: Cinematic fishing template. Stills via fal flux-pro/v1.1-ultra; looping video via fal Kling, then tools/vidkit.py web + poster. Logo on white via flux, then imgkit keyout. Every prompt = brand.json.styleSignature + subjectPrompt, seed 73412.
